Specifications by Email

Managed by Adelphos · Per-project subscription with unlimited regenerations

Email a project. Get back a complete MEP specification.

A bespoke email address that drafts a stage-appropriate specification from your model, your brief, and your house manufacturer library — deterministically, every time.

Email specifications@adelphos.ai SLA: Same-day for Stage 2 / 3; 24 hours for Stage 4
Send a brief to specifications@adelphos.ai → See how it works
Same-dayStage 2 / 3 turnaround
Hoursof agent runtime per spec
Reviewedby a human before delivery
1 emailis the entire interface

Description

Forward your project brief (or paste it in the email body), attach your Revit model (or link to it on your shared drive / ACC), and tell the agent which stage you're at. Within hours for a Stage 2/3 specification (24 hours for Stage 4), the agent returns a Word document populated with clauses driven by your live model, performance criteria from your brief, and manufacturer references from your house preferred list.

Before the spec lands in your inbox, a human reviewer on our service team checks it for tone, scope coverage, and any judgement calls the agent flagged. You get the final document plus a short note covering what the reviewer changed and why.

For a Stage 3 MEP specification on a typical commercial scheme this replaces 2–3 days of senior engineer time with a one-line email and a 30-minute review. Across a year, a five-engineer practice typically saves 60–90 working days of specification effort.

Specifications by Email will be the only spec-drafting service that works through your inbox — same hour, same standards, same manufacturers, every time.

The shift

What running this part of the business looks like today, versus with Specifications by Email.

Before

Specifications are a recurring pain — every Stage 3 means a senior engineer disappears for two days. Most practices ship a near-copy of the last one.

After Specifications by Email

Forward the brief and attach (or link to) the model. Get back a fully-drafted specification in your house Word template, with manufacturers from your preferred list, ready for issue.

What we offer

  • Per-project bespoke email address
  • Stage 2 / 3 / 4 specification templates
  • House preferred-manufacturer library applied
  • Human reviewer sign-off before delivery
  • Section-level regeneration via reply
  • Audit-ready provenance: every clause traces to a model element or brief line

How it becomes agentic

We don't drop a tool on your desk and walk away. We move you up an automation maturity ladder over weeks, not years, with a human on every step until the agent has earned autonomy.

1. Onboard — we set up your bespoke project email + add your house template + manufacturer library to your tenant.
2. First spec — you forward a brief, we run the spec, our reviewer signs off, you get it the same day.
3. Reply-driven refinement — reply with edits or 'regenerate section X' and the agent processes the change.
4. Self-service mode — once the agent has learned your house preferences, replies are auto-applied unless flagged.
5. Steady-state — every brief becomes a same-day spec; you only see the agent's work in your inbox.

Features

Everything Specifications by Email ships with as a managed service. Each item is a concrete capability — no marketing fluff.

  • Bespoke project email address Each project gets its own thread — context carries between emails.
  • Brief ingestion Paste, forward, or attach the brief — the agent reads all three.
  • Model + DMS link support Link to a Revit model on shared drive, ACC, or attach an .rvt.
  • Stage-aware authoring Stage 2, 3, 4 templates with the right scope per stage.
  • House preferred manufacturers Your office library applied automatically.
  • Word output, your house template Returned as a Word doc that matches your office styles.
  • Human service review A reviewer signs off every spec before it leaves us.
  • Reviewer notes Short note covering what the reviewer changed and why.
  • Section-level regeneration Reply with 'regenerate Section 4 with updated boilers' and you'll get just that section back.

How we work together

Engagement model

Per-project subscription with unlimited regenerations + monthly review with our service lead

Frequently asked questions

Quick answers AI engines (and humans) can pull from.

What is Specifications by Email?

A bespoke email address that drafts a stage-appropriate specification from your model, your brief, and your house manufacturer library — deterministically, every time.

What does Specifications by Email do?

Forward your project brief (or paste it in the email body), attach your Revit model (or link to it on your shared drive / ACC), and tell the agent which stage you're at. Within hours for a Stage 2/3 specification (24 hours for Stage 4), the agent returns a Word document populated with clauses driven by your live model, performance criteria from your brief, and manufacturer references from your house preferred list.

How is Specifications by Email different from the manual workflow?

Without Specifications by Email: Specifications are a recurring pain — every Stage 3 means a senior engineer disappears for two days. Most practices ship a near-copy of the last one. With Specifications by Email: Forward the brief and attach (or link to) the model. Get back a fully-drafted specification in your house Word template, with manufacturers from your preferred list, ready for issue.

How much time does Specifications by Email save?

Headline outcomes for Specifications by Email: Same-day (Stage 2 / 3 turnaround); Hours (of agent runtime per spec); Reviewed (by a human before delivery); 1 email (is the entire interface).

What's the engagement model for Specifications by Email?

Per-project subscription with unlimited regenerations + monthly review with our service lead
